titleStmt.title: SII 38.102: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 102. (A.R. No. 102 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south wall of the central shrine of the same temple.

summary.p: This inscription is carelessly engraved. It begins with the meykīrtti of the king, Tiṅgaḷērt-taru.

It registers a sale of 1000 kuḻi of land which was made tax-free by the members of the assembly of Maṇali alias Siṅgavishṇu-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a dēvadāna village of the Tiruvoṟṟiyūr uḍaiyār temple situated in Puḻal-nāḍu in Puḻal-kōṭṭam, (a sub-division) of Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam, to a military officer called Parāntakamārāyāṉ alias Rājādhirāja Nīlagaṅgaraiyar, a resident of Sattimaṅgalam in Iṉṉambarnāḍu, in Rājēndraśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu, (a sub-division) of Śōḷa-maṇḍalam. It is also records that the sabhā agreed to remit the tax on this land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiṅkaḷert tarutaṉ ṟoṅ
kal veṇkuṭaikkiḻ nilamakaḷ nilava ma
larmakaḷ puṇarntu ceṅkolocci ka
ruṅkali kaṭintu maṉṉupala Ūḻiyuḷ te
ṉṉavar muvaruḷ mānāparaṇaṉ poṉ
muṭi Āṉāp parumanip pacun=talai po
ru kaḷattari viḷakeraḷaṉaiRead vīrakeraḷaṉaiĀṉaikki
ṭuvittu Acaivil cuntarapāṇṭiya
ṉai ticaikeṭat tollaiyuḷ mullai
yūr turatti Olkalil veṇāṭṭaraica
c coṇāṭṭotukki mevu pukaḻ rāmakuṭa
mūvarkeṭa muṉintu miṭal keḻu
maṟuttāhava mallaṉaim Amcaṟa kevutal Āṅkarum pa
ṭaiyāl Āṅka vīraceṉaiyuḷ kaṇṭapayaṉuṅ kaṅkātiraṉu
m vaṇṭamar kaḷiṟṟoṭu maṭiya tiṇṭiṟal viritar vikkiyum vicai
yātittaṉuṅ karumuraṇc cāṅkamay yaṉu mutali nāsamāhi keṭat
tuṭaitta nimir cuṭarppoṉṉoṭayaṅkari puraviyoṭum piṭi
ttut taṉṉāṭaiyāṟ cayaṅkoṇṭu tuṉṉār koḷḷippākkai
Oḷḷeri maṭuttoru tanik kaṇṭāl porukaṭalu Itta Ilaṅkayai
kkiṟaivan muṭiyarintu muṉṟaṉak kuṭai teṉṟamiḻmaṇṭala muṭuva
tu miḻateḻu kaṭaliḻam pukki laṅkecuvaranākiya vikkiramapāṇṭiyaṉaip paruma
ṇi muṭi naṭi cikaṇṭikar villavar miṉavar veñciṉac caḷukkiyar vallavar mutalā
ṉa vaṇaṅka viṟṟirunta cayaṅkoṇṭa Uyar perumpukaḻk kovirāja
kesaripanmarāna Uṭaiyār śrīrājādhirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 8 Āvatu
100 3 10 4 jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu puḻaṟkoṭṭattu puḻalnāṭṭu tiruvo
ṟṟiyūr Uṭaiyār tevatāṉam maṇaliyāṉa ciṅkaviṣṇaccatuṟvetimaṅkalat
tu sabhaikkuc camain=ta neṭuveṭṭu can=tirak kiramavittaṉum Ikkuṭi bhāsukara kiramavi
ttaṉum Ikkuṭi tiruvikkiramacanmaṉum maṭṭaiyak kiramavittaṉum neṭuveṭppur
Āṭavallāṉ ce(l)āmaiyājiyum � rattu tiruvaṭṭakkiramavittaṉum
Uḷḷiṭṭa savaiyom nilavilaiyāvaṇaṅ kaiyyeḻuttu
coḻamaṇṭalattu rājen=tiraciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu Iṉṉamparnāṭṭu cattimaṅ
kalattu cattimaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ ce kaṇ kāṇi taṇṭanāyakam parā
n=takamārāyanāṉa taṇṭanāyakam rājādhirājanilakaṅkaraiyārkku nāṅ
kaḷ Eṅkaḷil Icaintu viṟkiṉṟa nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷur vaṭakaḻani tūṇi ni
lam [paramājaṉukku] vaṭakkum mel pāṟkellai talaikaṇi vāykkālukku kiḻa
kkum kiḻpāṟkelluRead as kiḻpāṟkellai•Ūr mañcikkattukku meṟkum Uḷḷiṭṭu patināṟṟu cāṇ
kolāl kuḻi Āyiramum nāṅkaḷey Iṟai Iṟuppatāka Eṅkaḷil Icai
poruḷaṟak koṇṭu Iṟaiyiḻucciviṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇam ceytu kuṭu
ttom muṟcollappaṭṭa sabhaikkuc camain=ta neṭuveṭpur cantira
kkiramavittaṉum Ikkuṭi phāsakkarakkiramavittaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭa sabh
aiyom .
Digital edition of SII 38.102 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
